name: Tooling swap and Hono entrypoint
outcome: The server boots on Hono via @hono/node-server on port 3000 and answers GET /api/ping, with NestJS/Express tooling removed.
scope: Dependency + tooling swap, modernizing the root tsconfig.json + package.json to ESNext + strict ESM, and the new composition entrypoint with a single ping route. No OAuth, DB, or views yet.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm dev starts the server on port 3000 via tsx watch
No @nestjs/*, express, body-parser, cookie-parser, or nodemon remain in package.json
tsconfig.json sets strict:true, verbatimModuleSyntax, isolatedModules, moduleDetection 'force', and lib [ESNext], with target ESNext + module/moduleResolution NodeNext retained
steps: package.json — remove @nestjs/*, @prisma/client, prisma, express, body-parser, cookie-parser, csrf-csrf, nunjucks, reflect-metadata, rxjs, class-validator, class-transformer, ts-node and their @types; add (at latest) hono, @hono/node-server, @hono/zod-validator, zod, drizzle-orm, drizzle-kit, postgres, tsx, vitest; keep type:module, bump @types/node to the current LTS, and add an engines.node floor (>=22)
package.json scripts — set dev to 'tsx watch src/index.ts' and build to 'tsc'; remove the nodemon dev script (db:* scripts are wired in later slices)

tsconfig.json — modernize to ESNext + strict: keep target ESNext and module/moduleResolution NodeNext (Node ESM, NOT bundler); add lib [ESNext], strict, verbatimModuleSyntax, isolatedModules, moduleDetection 'force', resolveJsonModule, skipLibCheck; drop experimentalDecorators/emitDecoratorMetadata; add jsx 'react-jsx' + jsxImportSource 'hono/jsx'; remove the `csrf-csrf` entry from compilerOptions.types (its dep is removed in this slice). The `./src/global.d.ts` entry in types and the `prisma/**/*.ts` include glob are pruned in the cleanup slice when those files are deleted
pnpm-workspace.yaml — prune the stale allowBuilds entries (@nestjs/core, @prisma/*, swc, prisma); add esbuild only if pnpm flags tsx's build script
src/index.ts — create a Hono app, mount hono/logger, add GET /api/ping returning 200, and serve via @hono/node-server on port 3000
notes:
Old NestJS files (src/main.ts, modules, controllers) stay on disk until the cleanup slice; tsx runs only src/index.ts so it does not import them. pnpm build (tsc) will not fully pass until cleanup.
